name: Strawberries with Strawberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 cups fresh strawberries, washed and stemmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide 2 cups of strawberries among 6 dessert dishes.
2. Puree the remaining 2 cups of strawberries in a blender with the sugar substitute and orange juice.
3. Pour the sauce evenly over the dessert cups.
4. Top each dessert cup with blueberries.
Serving size: 1/2 cup
Servings: 6
Exchanges:
- Fruit Exchange -- 1/2 Calories -- 41 Calories from Fat -- 0 Total Fat -- 0g Saturated Fat -- 0g Cholesterol -- 0mg Sodium -- 2mg Carbohydrate -- 10g Dietary Fiber -- 3g Sugars -- 6g Protein -- 1g
